scripts.dev:electron: concurrently "npm run web" "wait-on http://localhost:3001 && electron electron/main.js"
scripts.build:web: expo export --platform web --clear && node scripts/obfuscate.js dist
scripts.build:electron: npx rimraf dist && npm run build:web && electron-builder --config electron/builder.json
scripts.build:tv: EXPO_PUBLIC_TV=1 expo export --platform web --output-dir tv/dist --clear && node tv/patch-index.js && node scripts/obfuscate.js tv/dist
scripts.sim:lg: npm run build:tv && cp -r tv/dist/* tv/packaging/lg/ && ares-launch -s 26 tv/packaging/lg
scripts.sim:lg:inspect: npm run build:tv && cp -r tv/dist/* tv/packaging/lg/ && node tv/enable-inspector.js && (pkill -f webOS_TV_26_Simulator_1.5.0 || true) && sleep 3 && ares-launch -s 26 tv/packaging/lg
scripts.deploy:lg: npm run build:tv && cp -r tv/dist/* tv/packaging/lg/ && ares-package tv/packaging/lg -o tv/packaging/lg/out && ares-install tv/packaging/lg/out/*.ipk -d lg && ares-launch com.andrew1h1.iptvplayer -d lg
scripts.debug:lg: npm run build:tv && cp -r tv/dist/* tv/packaging/lg/ && ares-package tv/packaging/lg -o tv/packaging/lg/out --no-minify && ares-install tv/packaging/lg/out/*.ipk -d lg && ares-inspect -d lg -a com.andrew1h1.iptvplayer --open
